summary: Comprehensive testing of PriceHunter Razorpay paywall feature. All backend payment API tests (10/10) passed. Frontend paywall UI tests passed including modal appearance, close button, and chat input functionality after dismiss.
critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay integration uses LIVE keys (rzp_live_*) - ensure proper testing in sandbox before production
Payment status is stored in MongoDB but chat sessions are in-memory - consider persisting premium status across server restarts
Voice calls are MOCKED (except PANKTI SHAH real call which may hit rate limits)
Online e-commerce results are SIMULATED - not real API integrations

success_rate.frontend: 100% (paywall modal, close button, chat input all working)

seed_data_creation: None required - payment orders created dynamically via Razorpay API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment flow tested: POST /api/payments/create-order returns order_id, amount=9900, currency=INR, key_id. POST /api/payments/verify correctly rejects invalid signatures with 400. GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} returns is_premium=false for unpaid sessions. Frontend paywall modal appears 2s after search results with 'Congratulations' copy, Rs 99 price, pay button, close button. Close button dismisses paywall and chat input remains functional. Paywall does not reappear after being dismissed in same session. Pay button triggers Razorpay order creation (verified via backend API). Note: 60-second delay between progress animation and results display is active.

features_tested.payment_create_order_api: PASS - Returns order_id, amount=9900, currency=INR, key_id
features_tested.payment_status_api: PASS - Returns is_premium=false for unpaid sessions
features_tested.paywall_modal_appearance: PASS - Appears 2s after search results with correct content
features_tested.chat_input_after_dismiss: PASS - Chat input remains enabled and functional
features_tested.paywall_not_shown_twice: PASS - Paywall does not reappear after being dismissed
features_tested.pay_button_triggers_order: PASS - Verified via backend API (Razorpay checkout opens)

mocked_apis_note: IMPORTANT: Voice calls (Bland.ai) are MOCKED except PANKTI SHAH real call. Online e-commerce results are SIMULATED. LLM calls are REAL via Emergent key. Razorpay uses LIVE keys.
